creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
QLandkarte GT 1.7.6 has been released. Announcement:
	http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_id=31977305

Fix: The update is rather trivial:

svn status: 
M       Makefile
M       distinfo
M       pkg-plist

svn diff:


Regards,
Christoph--rSSppnQ10YD97Q3TNk4t88QSnJkAmT6LnO6vVAei0tsDq8l8
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 344403)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qlandkartegt
-PORTVERSION=	1.7.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.6
 CATEGORIES=	astro
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/QLandkarteGT%20${PORTVERSION}

===================================================================
--- distinfo	(revision 344403)
+++ distinfo	(working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (qlandkartegt-1.7.5.tar.gz) = a8b571ba838568ed258c61fa0ab18b370c7d22d2539a632a0028b78f4a22aa2c
-SIZE (qlandkartegt-1.7.5.tar.gz) = 8351098
+SHA256 (qlandkartegt-1.7.6.tar.gz) = ff1e352d07fd136e75a80035d888efe095f1f44ca15d46262169e98e5a14e1c3
+SIZE (qlandkartegt-1.7.6.tar.gz) = 8315692
